creator: amvandemore@gmail.com
text:
IME, targets not requiring auth are surprisingly common.  This statement is off the last few years of my work doing shorter terms at smaller companies focused on fast development.  Not saying this is ideal, but it's real world encounters.  I suppose that observation is generally reversed in enterprise environments with more defined network and security guidelines, but most smaller places seem to think "agile" means security optional.

Primarily I'm concerned with not automatically attaching all the targets so I think your solution would solve that and would be sufficient for my current use.  However I'm not sure that approach would compare favorably to other platforms initiator functionality.
